title: [Maelstrom Bay, Surface]
description: The sea swells break lazily against the stony base of the cliff wall, creating a dull and muted sussuration.  The cliff towers overhead, unwelcoming and unclimbable.  The waters of Maelstrom Bay, made a deep, bluish green by the moonlight, stretch out to the west.

The sea swells break lazily against the stony base of the cliff wall, creating a dull and muted susurration.  The cliff towers overhead, unwelcoming and unclimbable.  The green waters of Maelstrom Bay, bright in the sunlight, stretch out to the west.
paths: Obvious paths: north, southeast, south, west, northwest, down

wayto.11437: ;e if checkspell(112) then move 'southeast' else move 'swim southeast' end; waitrt?
wayto.11439: ;e if checkspell(112) then move 'northwest' else move 'swim northwest' end; waitrt?
wayto.11447: ;e if checkspell(112) then move 'west' else move 'swim west' end; waitrt?
wayto.11448: ;e if checkspell(112) then move 'south' else move 'swim south' end; waitrt?
wayto.11450: ;e if checkspell(112) then move 'north' else move 'swim north' end; waitrt?
